summary: Iteration 8 testing complete. All 12 backend tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed. Tested: Suppliers CRUD with 'code' field, Materials with 'code_article' field, Import Center History tab with /api/import/logs endpoint, RecipeDetail live simulation feature.
seed_data_creation: Created test supplier 'Test Supplier UI' with code 'FRN-UI-001', test material 'Test Material UI' with code_article 'MAT-UI-001'
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 8 features working correctly. Suppliers page has 'Code' column in table and 'code' input in form (NO delivery_time or minimum_order fields). Materials page has 'Code' column for code_article. Import Center is embedded in Settings page under 'Import' tab - History tab fetches from /api/import/logs and displays logs from MongoDB. RecipeDetail has live simulation mode with 'Simuler' button that enables editable inputs for quantity/price/freinte, real-time cost recalculation, and 'Réinitialiser' reset button.
